title: The blabber beast Remastered
description: Adds mighty beasts known as the blabber beasts!
body:
This adds many different sizes and speed of blabber beast, blabblets, blabber beast, apex blabber, and the big one.

anything bigger than the blabblets should never be fought head on, although even with that knowledge bigger blabbers have grown great armor that is immune to arrows. explosives are extremely effective against normal  and apex blabbers, the hide of the big one is hard to crack

also support me on patreon so i can post more epic updates!

[Noob's Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/noobdahack)

REQUIRES GECKOLIB

jei reccomended
